mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, total_amount, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status})

INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_price, quantity, total_price) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.totalPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT o.* FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE p.merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
SELECT o.* FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND p.merchant_id = #{merchantId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.category_id AS categoryId, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status IN (1, 3) THEN oi.total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS orderCount FROM product p LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON oi.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE p.merchant_id = #{merchantId} GROUP BY p.category_id ORDER BY p.category_id ASC
